programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple's looking for a bigger home to start a family in Memphis, Tennessee; she thinks he can't be trusted to finish household projects and wants something turnkey, but he's hoping to spend less and fix more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A creative pair are ready to relocate for an artistic life in Puglia, Italy; with an expert local guide, they experience Italian countryside La Dolce Vita and tour breathtaking bargain homes that are far beyond what they could afford in the U.S.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: A Seattle couple's ready to take a bold leap and start a family in Spain; with a local property expert guiding the way, they tour breathtaking bargain homes near Granada and see stunning places far beyond what they could ever afford in the U.S.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Joel and CC thought they had secured the perfect turnkey home, until living in it exposed a layout that frustrates hosting, storage, and each other.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple living in a small NYC apartment looks for more space in Wilmington, Delaware. She has nine months left to finish a dental residency, and he thinks it's too soon to buy, but she may be ready to pull the trigger if they find the right charmer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple's looking for a bigger home to start a family in Memphis, Tennessee; she thinks he can't be trusted to finish household projects and wants something turnkey, but he's hoping to spend less and fix more.

programme.desc: A Seattle couple's ready to take a bold leap and start a family in Spain; with a local property expert guiding the way, they tour breathtaking bargain homes near Granada and see stunning places far beyond what they could ever afford in the U.S.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: After completing the top floor of a local architect's downtown loft, Ben and Erin return to update the second floor after a fire; Erin steps outside her comfort zone to design a modern kitchen, entertainment room, and guest suite.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Greek island of Crete, a Tennessee woman travels 6000 miles in search of her forever home; with her bestie along, they discover the magic of local life, bargain homes, and the cheap cost of living.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: In the Italian region of Tuscany, a real estate expert helps a husband and wife search for a bargain dream home for their family; with insider knowledge on the local Tuscan culture, the couple discovers hidden gems and Italian traditions.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Italian island of Sicily, a local guide takes a couple on a unique tour of the sizzling local traditions as they explore affordable and dreamy homes.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Spanish coast just south of Barcelona, best friends from Texas look for an affordable dream home near Tarragona; with a local property expert, they tour through all the local culture and traditions the flavorful region has to offer.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big Dreams on a New Pitch in Nottingham
programme.desc: After months of moving across Europe, a family looks to put down roots in Nottingham, England. With a dream job, a new stay-at-home parent, and a child who's spent half his life on the road, they need to find a home that truly fits everyone's needs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After 10 years of working in tech, a woman becomes a student again and aims to get her MBA in Dublin. She's looking for something near the city center with room for her dog, but with a tight student budget, finding the right place may not be so easy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple's ready to trade their LA lives to surround their son with family and nature in her hometown of Perth, Australia. She prefers something nostalgic and he wants to avoid a reno, but finding a place that's in their budget may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Set to Ski in Villard-de-Lans, France

programme.sub-title: Sold It All for Balestrate, Italy
programme.desc: Empty nesters sell everything and leave Missouri to explore his Sicilian roots in Balestrate, Italy. They want something furnished that has a terrace with sea views, but they may have to make some compromises to find a place fast and in their budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A woman hopes to relive her college nostalgia with a move back to Granada, Spain. With a family of four, they're leaving behind the rising costs of Nashville, but are divided between spending for a larger home, or having more money for experiences.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A flight attendant puts his savings on the line for an all-cash purchase in Hua Hin, Thailand. He wants a modern condo that's near the beach, but in a booming real estate market, a local friend must temper his expectations about what he can afford.

programme.desc: The stars turn up the heat when they design dazzling kitchens and dining rooms in Week Three; teams go all-in, some desperate for their first win, and Page Turner from "Love It or List It" arrives to judge the gorgeous results.

programme.desc: Chip and Jo add a fresh, functional design to a dated ranch home in Waco.

programme.desc: Andrew and Brittany are first-time buyers; they're looking for a home with plenty of space for their beloved pooches.

programme.desc: Megan and Jeff both feel that their work-from-home life is no longer working for them; Megan wants a better family home; Jeff refuses to relocate.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Now with two kids, a couple has outgrown their home and deals with a lack of storage and an awkward layout; he grew up in the neighborhood and hopes Hilary can come up with a plan to stay, but she thinks David's new properties might be better.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Nina and Earl are ready to make a decision on whether or not they should renovate their dated, split-level home or find a better option that suits their love of mid-century modern design; Nina wants to prove their house can be mid-century fabulous.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple finds hope and happiness with an inheritance and looks to relocate; David helps them begin a new chapter by searching for homes in the picturesque town of Bath, Maine, including a sprawling eight-bedroom mansion.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A mother wins big on a scratcher, but since she already has her dream home, she has decided to help her daughter find hers; the duo enlists David to get her growing family out of a cramped apartment and into a house with more space in Bangor, Maine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Knock Knock, It's a Million Dollars!
programme.desc: After 30 years, a couple move to Columbia, S.C., after getting a $1 million check; they need David's help finding a dream home big enough to host their massive family for the holidays.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A $2 million win came at the perfect time for a couple who relocated from Philadelphia to take care of their family in Fayetteville, N.C.; David helps them track down the right home for hosting weekend barbecues with their 10 grandkids.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Gold star do-gooders who have struggled financially scratch up a $5 million win, and they barely know what to do with it; David steps in to make sure they spend some money on themselves and help find their dream home in Pensacola, Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Thanks to a family inheritance, a Midwestern couple are ready for the relaxing vibes of central Florida; they're bringing in David to help search for their forever home, and now it's a decision between a golf course view and a relaxing rural outlook.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: Rock the Block
programme.desc: It's Week Four, and teams head into their multi-generation suites to create one-of-a-kind spaces; they're tasked with juggling a new design twist: adding something new, old, borrowed or blue; everyone gets to judge each other's work!

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico. They're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: A couple have quit their jobs, sold their house, and they're ready to leave the rat race for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands. One has champagne taste and is out to splurge, but the other is budget-conscious and wants to put a cork in the spending.

programme.desc: A family is left financially drained and with an unfinished, dangerous mess after a contractor abandoned their two-story addition project; Mike, Sherry and Michael must contend with the triple threat of plumbing, electrical and HVAC issues.

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: Homeowners are left financially strapped after a contractor abandoned their basement addition project, leaving them with a hazardous home; Mike, Sherry and Michael must now contend with unmovable bulkheads, unsightly posts and a bumpy floor.

programme.desc: Homeowners had big plans to build a basement apartment for his aging mom, but a crooked contractor left them with a dangerous mess; Mike, Sherry and Michael step in to help and are shocked to find live wires, sloppy framing and dangerous gas leaks.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A large family searches for an affordable waterfront home in Cape Coral, Fla; they balance a tight budget and specific demands against the challenges of the competitive local housing market.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A fireman and a nurse, who are a father-daughter duo, search for a coastal home in St. Augustine, Fla; they seek a property for sunsets and barbecues while balancing their different styles.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: Lovebirds share a dream of joining their families on a slice of coastal paradise in Norfolk, Virginia; they're ready to wade through bayside views to find a beach house bargain, but his dock-side dad jokes may clash with their straight-laced agent.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A powerhouse fighting duo exits the ring to find an affordable seaside retreat in Myrtle Beach; the house hunt becomes a literal sparring match as they debate pantry space and square footage.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A couple's ready to slow things down and find their seaside sanctuary in Astoria, Oregon; despite the low beach house prices, one of them has a renovation wish list that keeps rising, and it may threaten to swell costs beyond their budget.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: A Texas family explores the shores of North Padre Island searching for an affordable dream home; they navigate their set budget to find hidden real estate gems that accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn put their all on the line as they attempt their priciest flip to date.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: With rotting floors, rats, and roaming chickens, Kamohai and Tristyn make an offer on the worst house they've ever seen. The deal falls out of escrow and returns at a bargain price, and now, they must transform this total disaster into a dream home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: Deep in the French countryside, a local expert helps a mother and daughter duo hunt bargain properties in Carcassonne; mom's looking to start a new life in a beautiful home and the search includes medieval castles, antique fairs, and some fine cheese.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the northwest coast of Spain, a relocation expert guides a young couple searching for a dream bargain home in Galicia; they're taking in all the local culture of the region as they enjoy the natural thermal spas and learn how to make cheese!

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After eight years together in Montreal, a creative couple looks to refocus on growing their art in Copenhagen, Denmark. They're looking for a modern apartment near the city center, but with a small budget, they may need to compromise on location.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: Clare and her best friend Brid are on a mission to find Clare's family a home in Western Sydney. Clare wants room for her kids to grow, while eagle-eyed Brid focuses on the little details.

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: Bridget wants a Hamptons-style cottage with a pool, while Paul seeks a home with character and a toolshed; will they find their dream home?

programme.title: House Hunters Australia
programme.desc: Matt seeks a workshop for his many projects, while Mel dreams of a spacious, character-filled home with guest accommodation; together, they search for a property that fits both visions.
